attributes.class: login-class ng-untouched ng-pristine ng-valid ion-untouched ion-pristine ion-valid sc-ion-input-md-h sc-ion-input-md-s md input-label-placement-start in-item hydrated
ion-button-style md button button-round button-solid ion-activatable ion-focusable hydrated

reviewSummary.summary: The draft captures the primary login form controls but contains duplicate password elements, brittle dynamic locators, noisy layout content, and is missing key workflow validation and navigation elements required for robust downstream automation.

issues.message: Two separate elements represent the same password control. One is the internal native input and the other is the parent ion-input wrapper.
issues.suggested_fix: Keep only the stable automation-facing password field element using locator id=password and remove the duplicate native input entry.

issues.message: Locator id=ion-input-0 appears framework-generated and likely unstable across sessions or builds.
issues.suggested_fix: Use a more stable locator such as xpath=//input[@placeholder='User Name'] or another semantic attribute-based locator.

issues.message: Locator id=ion-input-1 appears framework-generated and brittle.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the duplicate entry and retain the stable locator id=password.

issues.message: The element name 'password' is ambiguous and not descriptive enough for reusable page modeling.
The background content container is decorative layout structure and not useful for workflow automation.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove this element from the approved page model.

issues.message: The workflow explicitly requires Back button navigation coverage but no Back button element exists in the approved model.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a back_button element using the stable locator id=auto_back_btn.

issues.message: The workflow explicitly requires Home button navigation coverage but no Home button element exists in the approved model.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a home_button element using the stable locator id=auto_home_btn.

issues.message: The workflow depends heavily on validating the generic Failed authentication message, but no authentication failure message element is present.
issues.suggested_fix: Add an authentication_failed_message element using a semantic locator such as xpath=//*[contains(normalize-space(.),'Failed')].

issues.message: The workflow validates successful authenticated Home state but no authenticated state indicators are represented.
issues.suggested_fix: Add reusable authenticated state indicators such as authenticated_user_identity_display and authenticated_feature_area when available from upstream Home page extraction.

issues.message: The retained password field should represent the actual business input control rather than the framework-generated native child input.
issues.suggested_fix: Classify the stable id=password ion-input control as the canonical password_textbox element.

approved_elements.name: username_textbox
approved_elements.description: Username input field used for authentication.

approved_elements.name: password_textbox
approved_elements.description: Password input field with masked entry behavior.

approved_elements.name: back_button
approved_elements.description: Navigation button used to return to the Home page without authentication.

approved_elements.name: home_button
approved_elements.description: Navigation button used to return directly to the Home page.

approved_elements.name: authentication_failed_message
approved_elements.description: Generic authentication failure message displayed for invalid login attempts.
